---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how the feature should work. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Mockups, examples, or any other context that would help.
